steps.title: Identify the sentence role
steps.content: The underlined sentence adds a second reason Mapping the Interior matters: by featuring Blackfeet main characters, it helped ensure Indigenous people have a place in horror fiction.

steps.title: Avoid invented functions
steps.content: Choice A invents a dispute about whether Jones based the novella on his life. Choice B predicts what non-Indigenous authors will do, which the sentence does not discuss. Choice D invents a question about reader purchases. The remaining choice captures the sentence's point about representation. The answer is C.
